creator: iblis.dif01@nctu.edu.tw
text:
(In reply to Mark Felder from comment #2)
The gui require py3-gobject3 and py-xdg (https://github.com/jonls/redshift/blob/1ca04459f439e645b79ece6983fa2600bfe9b567/src/redshift-gtk/utils.py#L23-L24).

But... The default option do not have `GUI` selected. I think the `pkg install` will only get the package with default option. None of python package will be rely on when user issue `pkg install` , right?
